data.title: Carnival shareholders approve corporate unification and governance measures
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Carnival ( (CCL) ).

At the April 17, 2026 annual meetings, Carnival Corporation & plc shareholders re-elected all director nominees and approved a slate of governance and compensation resolutions, including executive pay, auditor appointments and share issuance and buyback authorities. The broad support across these items underscores shareholder backing for the boards’ current strategy and capital framework.

On the same date, Carnival plc shareholders at a Court Meeting and subsequent special meetings of both Carnival entities approved the unification of the dual-listed company structure and the redomiciliation of Carnival Corporation from Panama to Bermuda. These votes clear a key hurdle toward simplifying the group’s corporate structure, potentially improving governance efficiency, capital markets flexibility and alignment of interests across the combined shareholder base.

The most recent analyst rating on (CCL) stock is a Buy with a $36.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Carnival stock, see the CCL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CCL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CCL is a Neutral.

The score reflects strong post-2022 financial recovery and a constructive earnings-call outlook (record results, bookings strength, and improved guidance), tempered by still-elevated leverage and a notably weak technical setup (price below all major moving averages with negative momentum). A high P/E and low dividend yield further limit the valuation component.

To see Spark’s full report on CCL stock, click here.

More about Carnival

Carnival Corporation & plc operates in the global cruise and leisure travel industry, running a portfolio of cruise brands that offer ocean-going vacations and related onboard services. The company targets mainstream, premium and luxury cruise segments across key markets including North America, Europe and other international regions, competing with other major cruise operators for discretionary travel spending.

data.title: Petrobras Weighs New Braskem Governance Pact as Novonor Sells Stake
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras ( (PBR) ).

On April 20, 2026, Petrobras disclosed that Novonor group entities and investment vehicles managed by Vórtx Capital and advised by IG4 executed a judicial share purchase agreement for the sale of common and Class A preferred shares of petrochemical producer Braskem, subject to precedent conditions. Petrobras’ executive board is currently assessing the deal’s terms to decide whether to waive its preemptive and tag-along rights under the existing Braskem shareholders’ agreement, in line with a mandate from its board granted on February 11, 2026.

The company also reported receiving on April 19, 2026 a binding letter from the acquiring fund proposing a new Braskem shareholders’ agreement that would create balanced governance between Petrobras and the fund, with consensus required for key decisions and equal representation on both the board of directors and the executive board. The parallel evaluations of the potential sale and the proposed governance overhaul could reshape Petrobras’ influence over Braskem’s strategy and risk profile, and Petrobras has pledged to disclose any material developments to the market as they arise.

The most recent analyst rating on (PBR) stock is a Buy with a $24.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras stock, see the PBR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PBR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PBR is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong margins and cash generation, though cyclical and less robust than peak years) and strong technical trend signals despite overbought momentum risk. Valuation is a major positive with a very low P/E and high dividend yield, while the earnings call supports the outlook via operational execution but flags key risks from oil-price exposure (no hedging) and elevated debt/leasing obligations.

To see Spark’s full report on PBR stock, click here.

More about Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras

Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. – Petrobras is Brazil’s state-controlled oil and gas major, active across exploration, production, refining, and petrochemicals, with a strategic role in Latin America’s energy sector. Through significant equity stakes in companies such as Braskem, it exerts influence over the regional petrochemical value chain and corporate governance in key downstream assets.

data.title: B2Gold to Sell Fingold Joint Venture Stake to Agnico Eagle for US$325 Million and Forge Nunavut Collaboration
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from B2Gold ( (TSE:BTO) ).

On April 20, 2026, B2Gold agreed to sell its 70% stake in Fingold Ventures, which controls exploration claims near Rupert Resources’ Ikkari project in northern Finland, to Agnico Eagle Mines for US$325 million in cash, with closing expected later in April. B2Gold plans to use the proceeds to bolster its balance sheet, support share repurchases under its normal course issuer bid and fund general working capital, while Aurion Resources, owner of the remaining 30%, has waived its right of first refusal, underscoring the transaction’s clean execution.

The company also unveiled a Nunavut collaboration agreement with Agnico Eagle aimed at sharing operational knowledge and best practices across their Canadian Arctic operations, spanning mining and processing, logistics, exploration, HR, safety and environmental management. Although non-exclusive and involving no asset transfers, the partnership is designed to enhance operational efficiency and strengthen both miners’ sustainable, community-focused presence in Nunavut, potentially reinforcing B2Gold’s operational credentials in challenging northern environments.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BTO) stock is a Hold with a C$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on B2Gold stock, see the TSE:BTO Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Fortuna Mining Expands into Guyana Shield with Quartzstone Gold Earn-In
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Fortuna Mining Corp ( (TSE:FVI) ) has issued an update.

On April 20, 2026, Fortuna Mining Corp. announced an earn-in agreement with private Guyanese firm Qstone Inc. that could give Fortuna up to a 70% stake in the 29,600-hectare Quartzstone gold project in the Guyana Shield, a region with a strong history of gold discoveries. Historical drilling from 2010 to 2017 along a five-kilometer corridor at Quartzstone outlined multiple high-grade, near-surface gold zones within a 26-kilometer shear system, positioning the asset as a potentially significant addition to Fortuna’s growth pipeline.

The company has budgeted about US$5.5 million for initial exploration, including geophysics, geochemical work, mapping, and a 5,000-meter diamond drill program to test historical targets and untested structural corridors. Under the staged earn-in, Fortuna can first secure 51% of Quartzstone by drilling at least 60,000 meters within four years and funding all project costs, and it may lift its interest to 70% by solely funding a feasibility study, a structure that expands its Latin America– and Africa-focused portfolio into Guyana with limited upfront capital but added royalty commitments.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FVI) stock is a Buy with a C$14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fortuna Mining Corp stock, see the TSE:FVI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FVI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FVI is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance (material margin and cash flow strength with conservative leverage) and a constructive, growth-focused earnings call backed by strong liquidity. Valuation is supportive with a low P/E, while technical signals are only moderately positive and remain largely neutral on momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on FVI stock, click here.

More about Fortuna Mining Corp

Fortuna Mining Corp. is a Canadian precious metals producer with three operating mines and exploration projects in Argentina, Côte d’Ivoire, Mexico, Peru, and the Diamba Sud gold project in Senegal. The company focuses on gold and silver production and emphasizes sustainability, environmental stewardship, and social responsibility in its operations and stakeholder relationships.

Momentus Inc. disclosed that on September 25, 2025, it issued a junior secured convertible note with a principal amount of $1.63 million and accompanying warrants to Yield Point NY, LLC in a private placement, with the note’s conversion price later adjusted downward following subsequent share issuances. data.title: Tyler Technologies Completes Acquisition of For The Record
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Tyler Technologies ( (TYL) ) is now available.

On April 14, 2026, Tyler Technologies announced it has completed its previously disclosed acquisition of For The Record (FTR), a digital court‑recording pioneer, in an all‑cash transaction valued at approximately $212.5 million. For The Record’s management and staff will remain in place, continuing operations from offices in Phoenix, Boston, and Brisbane as Tyler works on an integration plan for the combined business.

The deal adds FTR’s AI‑powered, “legal grade” speech‑to‑text, multilingual real‑time transcription, and cloud‑enabled courtroom recording solutions to Tyler’s courts and justice portfolio. By creating a more seamless courtroom ecosystem and enabling near real‑time access to transcripts integrated with case management systems, Tyler aims to modernize court workflows, reduce backlogs, and deepen its competitive position in justice technology through enhanced “judicial intelligence” capabilities for judges, clerks, and attorneys.

The most recent analyst rating on (TYL) stock is a Buy with a $460.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tyler Technologies stock, see the TYL Stock Forecast page.

More about Tyler Technologies

Tyler Technologies, Inc. is a leading provider of integrated software and technology services for the public sector, offering end-to-end solutions that help local, state, and federal government entities operate efficiently and transparently. The S&P 500 company, headquartered in Plano, Texas, serves more than 15,000 locations and 45,000 installations across all 50 U.S. states, Canada, the Caribbean, Australia, and other international markets.

Its platforms connect data and processes across disparate government systems, enabling clients to turn insights into actionable solutions for their communities and advance digital transformation. Tyler has been repeatedly recognized for growth and innovation, including placement on Government Technology’s GovTech 100 list, underscoring its strong positioning in the govtech and justice technology markets.

An announcement from BP ( (BP) ) is now available.

BP p.l.c. disclosed that on 10 April 2026 it transferred 355,880 ordinary shares out of treasury to satisfy distributions under certain employee share schemes, slightly reducing its treasury stock position. Following the move, BP now holds 784,211,237 shares in treasury, representing 4.99% of total voting rights, and the total number of voting rights in the company stands at 15,707,184,257, information that helps shareholders assess whether they must report holdings under U.K. disclosure and transparency rules.

The adjustment, announced on 20 April 2026, reflects routine use of treasury shares to meet employee incentive obligations without issuing new equity into the market. While operationally minor, the updated voting-rights figure is important for investors and regulatory compliance, as it affects calculations of ownership thresholds that can trigger mandatory disclosure of interests in BP.

data.title: B2Gold Details Goose Mine Fire Impact, Keeps 2026 Production Guidance Intact
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from B2Gold ( (TSE:BTO) ) is now available.

On April 19, 2026, B2Gold reported an operational update following a fire that occurred on April 16, 2026 in parts of the crushing circuit at its Goose Mine, confirming there were no injuries and that damage was confined to the crushing area, with the mill and power facilities unaffected. The miner is using on-site mobile crushers and additional temporary crushing capacity scheduled for delivery in the second quarter of 2026 to maintain reduced throughput while it undertakes repairs.

B2Gold expects repairs to the fixed crushing circuit, estimated to cost about C$10 million, to be completed in the third quarter of 2026 in parallel with a planned run-of-mine bin and apron feeder installation, targeting an average capacity of roughly 3,200 tonnes per day by the end of that period. Gold output from Goose Mine, which delivered 42,876 ounces in the first quarter of 2026, is now forecast to fall to 18,000–20,000 ounces in the second quarter, around 10,000 ounces below prior internal expectations, but the company is maintaining its full-year 2026 Goose Mine production guidance of 170,000–230,000 ounces, suggesting the impact is expected to be confined mainly to the second quarter.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BTO) stock is a Hold with a C$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on B2Gold stock, see the TSE:BTO Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Flexible Solutions Highlights 2025 Results and Growth Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Flexible Solutions International ( (FSI) ) is now available.

On April 15, 2026, Flexible Solutions International reported full-year 2025 revenue of $38.5 million, essentially flat versus 2024, while net income declined to $0.8 million, or $0.06 per share, from $3.0 million, or $0.24 per share, a year earlier. Non-GAAP operating cash flow fell to $5.5 million, or $0.44 per share, from $7.1 million, or $0.57 per share, with management highlighting continued profitability despite the investment load.

CEO Daniel B. O’Brien said the company fully refurbished its Illinois factory in 2025 to support two new major food-grade contracts and completed a new agriculture and industrial products plant in Panama, all without raising equity or debt. These moves reposition the Illinois site to focus on growth in food markets and shift some agricultural and industrial production to Panama, reflecting a strategic push into higher-value food and nutrition segments while maintaining cash-generating operations in polymers and water treatment.

On April 17, 2026, the company held a conference call to discuss the 2025 financial performance and operational developments. Management underscored that the NanoChem division and ENP subsidiary remain the dominant sources of revenue and cash flow, while emerging opportunities in detergents, water treatment, oilfield extraction, turf, ornamental and agricultural applications, alongside food and supplement manufacturing, are expected to support future sales expansion.

The most recent analyst rating on (FSI) stock is a Buy with a $11.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Flexible Solutions International stock, see the FSI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FSI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FSI is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakened recent financial performance (sharp earnings deterioration and volatile/negative free cash flow), partially offset by a strong low-debt balance sheet. Technicals are moderately supportive but show overbought risk, while valuation signals are limited/weak based on the provided P/E and lack of dividend data. Earnings-call guidance adds a constructive outlook for 2026, but execution and tariff/input-cost risks remain significant.

To see Spark’s full report on FSI stock, click here.

More about Flexible Solutions International

Flexible Solutions International Inc., based in Taber, Alberta, develops and manufactures biodegradable polymers used in oil extraction, detergent ingredients, water treatment and crop nutrient availability chemistry. The company also produces environmentally safe water and energy conservation technologies and is expanding its presence in the food and nutrition supplement manufacturing markets, with its NanoChem division and ENP subsidiary remaining key revenue drivers.

The firm’s product portfolio targets detergent, water treatment, oilfield, turf, ornamental and agricultural markets, while more recent efforts focus on scaling food-grade production. Its operational footprint now includes a refurbished factory in Illinois geared toward major food-grade contracts and a new international agriculture and industrial products facility in Panama, intended to support future growth and segment specialization.

The latest update is out from Harmony Gold Mining ( (HMY) ).

On 20 April 2026, Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited announced that asset manager Ninety One (Pty) Ltd. had increased its holding in the miner’s ordinary shares. Ninety One now owns 5.2017% of Harmony’s issued share capital, crossing a disclosure threshold that triggers mandatory notification under South African company and JSE listing regulations.

Harmony confirmed it has filed the required notice with the Takeover Regulation Panel, signalling full compliance with section 122 of the Companies Act. The board, which has accepted responsibility for the accuracy of the disclosure, framed the development as a formal recognition of a significant institutional shareholder on its register, a data point closely watched by existing and prospective investors.

The announcement, dated 20 April 2026 from Johannesburg, underscores regulatory transparency around shifts in Harmony’s ownership structure. While the company did not comment on strategic implications, the increased stake by Ninety One may be interpreted by the market as a vote of confidence from a major fund manager in Harmony’s prospects and governance.

data.title: Beamr Showcases ML-Safe Video Compression for dSPACE Autonomous Vehicle Data Logging
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Beamr Imaging Ltd. ( (BMR) ) is now available.

Beamr Imaging Ltd., a Nasdaq-listed specialist in content-adaptive video compression, develops CABR technology that shrinks video files while maintaining quality for customers across media, user-generated content, machine learning, and autonomous vehicles. Its solutions, protected by dozens of patents and recognized with an Emmy for Technology and Engineering, are available for deployment on-premises and across major cloud platforms, including Amazon Web Services and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.

On April 20, 2026, Beamr announced that tests using dSPACE’s RTMaps platform for autonomous vehicle data logging showed its CABR compression reduced file sizes by 31% versus baseline encodes and by 97% versus uncompressed video, without degrading machine learning model accuracy. The companies planned to demonstrate these results at the dSPACE User Conference in Novi, Michigan, on April 21–22, 2026, underscoring Beamr’s bid to become a key efficiency partner in the autonomous vehicle development pipeline as AV fleets struggle with the cost and complexity of storing and processing massive volumes of test-drive video data.

Previous benchmarks cited by Beamr showed ML-safe compression with up to 50% file size reduction across AV workflows and minimal impact on object detection metrics and foundation model-based captioning. By validating CABR within the RTMaps ecosystem and outlining plans to extend testing to simulation and hardware-in-the-loop stages, Beamr aims to reassure AV developers that they can compress logged video at scale without retraining models or risking accuracy, potentially lowering infrastructure costs and speeding development cycles for industry stakeholders.

Spark’s Take on BMR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BMR is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance (revenue contraction, widening losses, and ongoing cash burn) despite strong gross margins and minimal debt. Technicals add downside pressure with a clear downtrend and negative MACD, while valuation is not supportive due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on BMR stock, click here.

More about Beamr Imaging Ltd.

Beamr Imaging Ltd. is a Nasdaq-listed leader in content-adaptive video compression technology, best known for its CABR perceptual optimization platform used by major media players such as Netflix and Paramount. Its Emmy Award-winning solutions target high-growth markets including media and entertainment, user-generated content, machine learning, and autonomous vehicles, and can be deployed on-premises or in public clouds like AWS and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.

The company focuses on reducing video file sizes by up to 50% while preserving visual quality and enabling AI-driven enhancements across data-intensive workflows. By extending its technology into autonomous driving and AV testing ecosystems, Beamr is positioning itself as an infrastructure efficiency enabler for industries grappling with massive video and sensor data volumes.

data.title: YY Group Holding Posts Strong 2025 Revenue Growth but Books Heavy Impairments and Higher Leverage
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

YY Group Holding Limited Class A ( (YYGH) ) has provided an announcement.

YY Group Holding Limited reported audited results for the year ended December 31, 2025, showing total assets more than doubling to $34.3 million from $15.4 million a year earlier, driven by new intangible assets, investment properties, lease investments and goodwill. Revenue climbed to $57.2 million in 2025 from $41.1 million in 2024 and $31.8 million in 2023, with gross profit rising to $7.9 million, but the group swung to a much larger accumulated deficit of $25.7 million due to sharply higher general and administrative expenses and sizeable impairment charges on newly acquired intangibles and goodwill.

Liabilities also increased significantly, with total borrowings, warrant liabilities and payables pushing total liabilities to $20.7 million at year-end 2025, up from $9.2 million in 2024, while equity attributable to shareholders rose to $10.3 million and non-controlling interests expanded to $3.3 million, reflecting fresh capital and consolidation effects. The combination of accelerating revenue growth and margin expansion alongside heavy operating costs, rising leverage and impairment losses underscores a business in rapid build-out mode ahead of management’s stated goal of achieving profitability in 2026, leaving investors weighing growth momentum against execution and balance-sheet risks.

Spark’s Take on YYGH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, YYGH is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance, driven by ongoing losses and negative operating/free cash flow despite strong revenue growth. Technicals are mixed with modest near-term support but a still-weak longer-term trend. Valuation is pressured by a negative P/E (loss-making) and no available dividend yield.

An announcement from Massimo Group ( (MAMO) ) is now available.

On April 14, 2026, Massimo Group implemented a leadership transition in which long-time executive David Shan stepped down as Chief Executive Officer to become Executive Chairman, retaining his existing compensation and remaining actively involved in the company’s strategic direction and operations. The move keeps Shan in an oversight role while shifting day-to-day leadership, aiming to balance continuity with refreshed executive management as Massimo navigates evolving market demands.

Effective the same day, Vice President Quenton Petersen was promoted to CEO while continuing in his vice president role, following a tenure since 2018 in which he led commercial strategy, expanded distribution, and strengthened relationships across dealer, retail, and e-commerce channels. His appointment, formally announced on April 20, 2026, underscores Massimo’s focus on leveraging his sales and channel-development expertise as the company explores growth in utility vehicles and electric mobility platforms, including the potential integration of advanced technologies to support smart mobility and facility operations applications.

Stardust Power ( (SDST) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 20, 2026, Stardust Power Inc. announced it had signed a non-binding letter of intent with a single institutional investor outlining a framework for up to $150 million of project-level financing for its planned lithium refinery in Muskogee, Oklahoma. The contemplated funding, which may be structured across equity, debt and hybrid instruments, is intended to complement other capital sources, support long-term planning for the refinery and help establish a transparent market-based valuation while limiting dilution for existing public shareholders.

The institutional framework, which remains subject to due diligence and definitive agreements, marks a significant step in building out the refinery’s capital stack and gives greater visibility on financing for construction of the facility. The move underscores rising institutional interest in U.S. lithium refining infrastructure, reinforces Stardust Power’s positioning as a viable player in the domestic battery materials supply chain and may improve confidence among stakeholders as the company advances toward developing a large-scale source of battery-grade lithium carbonate.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ennis ( (EBF) ) has provided an update.

On April 20, 2026, Ennis reported that fourth-quarter 2026 revenue rose 4.0% year on year to $96.4 million, while net earnings held at $8.8 million, or $0.35 per diluted share, as gross margin slipped slightly to 29.2%. For the fiscal year ended February 28, 2026, revenue edged down 0.6% to $392.4 million, but higher margins lifted net earnings to $42.6 million, or $1.66 per diluted share, helped by acquisitions that boosted EPS and by the completed integration of Northeastern Envelope Company.

Management highlighted a debt-free balance sheet with strong cash reserves, steady EBITDA and active capital deployment, including $8.0 million spent to buy a previously leased facility and $14.5 million used to repurchase about 793,000 shares. The company also reduced inventory tied to carbonless paper amid a domestic mill closure, moved to alternative suppliers without expected disruption, and set July 16, 2026, as the date for its 2026 annual shareholder meeting, with a record date of May 15, 2026.

Ennis, Inc. is one of the largest U.S. private-label printed business product suppliers, founded in 1909 and headquartered in Midlothian, Texas. The company manufactures and sells business forms, envelopes, labels, secure documents, specialty packaging, direct mail, plastic cards and other custom printed and electronic media through a national distributor network.

Its production and distribution facilities are strategically located across the United States, supporting a broad catalog that includes integrated forms, presentation products, flexographic printing, advertising specialties and internal bank forms. This footprint is aimed at efficiently serving business customers nationwide with both traditional and specialty print solutions.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Carnival ( (CCL) ) has issued an update.

At the April 17, 2026 annual meetings, shareholders of Carnival Corporation and Carnival plc re-elected all board nominees and approved all management-backed proposals, including advisory votes on executive pay, auditor appointments, share issuance authorities and a buyback mandate. These results reinforce board stability and give the company broad financial and governance flexibility as it manages capital structure and investor returns.

On the same date, Carnival plc shareholders at a Court Meeting approved the scheme underpinning the unification of the dual-listed structure and the redomiciliation of Carnival Corporation from Panama to Bermuda, with more than 75% of votes in value cast in favor. Subsequent special meetings of both Carnival entities also backed the unification, new governing documents and redomiciliation measures, paving the way for a simplified corporate structure that may streamline governance and potentially enhance market perception and operational efficiency for stakeholders.
